loop.observation: Core evidence outputs were individually green, but aggregate health was still inferred manually.
loop.hypothesis: SSOT-declared assertions over existing evidence JSON make self-improvement health executable.
loop.execute: Run source evidence tools, load their JSON outputs, verify required assertions, and publish the aggregate evidence artifact.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails when required evidence is missing, an assertion fails, the generated reader drifts, or workflow artifact upload disappears.
loop.retrospective: The aggregate remains a thin evidence sidecar while domain ownership stays in the existing loop, workflow, knowledge, and CI tools.

required_evidence.description: Workflow evidence coverage and tool binding
Lint and Go CI command evidence

closed_loop_classes.description: A bug fix is closed only when failure surfaces, regression checks, and broad CI are all verified.
A feature is closed only when executable knowledge, workflow coverage, and loop evidence are all verified.
